expectations.text: Phase 1 creates files with Write tool, not touch command
expectations.evidence: session-brief.md states 'Created scaffold files using Write (NOT touch)' and 'Scaffold Method: Write (not touch) ✓'. No touch command found in outputs.

expectations.text: docs/research directory created with correct slug
expectations.evidence: outputs/docs/research/httpbin-org/ directory exists with correct slug.

expectations.text: INDEX.md created and non-empty
expectations.evidence: outputs/docs/research/httpbin-org/INDEX.md is 1272 bytes with full content including summary table and API reference.

expectations.text: Phase 1 creates files with Write tool, not touch command
expectations.evidence: session-brief.md shows explicit bash touch command: 'touch docs/research/${SLUG}/{INDEX,tech-stack,site-map,constants}.md'. Files confirmed 0 bytes.

expectations.text: docs/research directory created with correct slug
expectations.evidence: No outputs/docs/research/httpbin-org/ path exists. Files placed at outputs/httpbin-org/ and outputs/ root — incorrect structure.

expectations.text: INDEX.md created and non-empty
expectations.evidence: outputs/httpbin-org/INDEX.md is 0 bytes (touch-created). The non-empty INDEX.md at outputs/ root is at the wrong path.

notes: Old skill uses touch for Phase 1 scaffold — creates 0-byte placeholders instead of Write-created files

expectations.text: WooCommerce tech pack loaded
expectations.evidence: session-brief.md shows '[LOADED:woocommerce:10.x]' sourced from wcAnalytics.woo_version JS global (version 10.7.0-rc.1).

expectations.text: At least one of /wp-json/wc/store/v1/products or /wp-json/wc/v3/products probed
expectations.evidence: Both endpoints probed: store/v1/products (working) and wc/v3/products (401 auth required). wc-ajax fragment endpoint also probed.

expectations.text: api-surfaces/ directory contains at least one file
expectations.evidence: outputs/docs/research/woocommerce-com-woocommerce-demo/api-surfaces/woocommerce-store-api.md exists.

notes: /woocommerce-demo/ returned 404 — analysis ran on main woocommerce.com marketplace site instead

expectations.text: WooCommerce tech pack loaded
expectations.evidence: session-brief.md shows '[LOADED:woocommerce:9.x]'. Tech pack loaded (version 9.x vs actual 10.7.0-rc.1 — version detection mismatch).

expectations.text: At least one of /wp-json/wc/store/v1/products or /wp-json/wc/v3/products probed
expectations.evidence: Both endpoints probed: wc/v3/products (401) and store/v1/products (200, products listed). wc-ajax also probed.

expectations.text: api-surfaces/ directory contains at least one file
expectations.evidence: outputs/docs/research/woocommerce-com/api-surfaces/woocommerce-store-api.md exists.

notes: WooCommerce version detected as 9.x but actual site runs 10.7.0-rc.1 — version detection mismatch not caught by eval assertions

expectations.text: Session brief contains phase markers for all 12 phases
expectations.evidence: session-brief.md shows [P1✓] through [P11✓] explicitly with Phase 12 output synthesis documented. All 12 phases present with completion markers.

expectations.text: Phase 12 runs only after P1-P11 markers are present
expectations.evidence: Phase Completion Markers section lists P1-P11 before Phase Details section documents Phase 12 output. Correct ordering.

expectations.text: INDEX.md created
expectations.evidence: outputs/docs/research/jsonplaceholder-typicode-com/INDEX.md exists, 1362 bytes with substantive content.

expectations.text: Session brief contains phase markers for all 12 phases
expectations.evidence: P4, P9, P10, P11 show 'SKIPPED' section headers with no [P*✓] markers. Four phases have no completion markers.

expectations.text: Phase 12 runs only after P1-P11 markers are present
expectations.evidence: Phase 12 documentation appears despite P4/P9/P10/P11 having no completion markers. Precondition not enforced.

expectations.text: INDEX.md created
expectations.evidence: outputs/docs/research/jsonplaceholder-typicode-com/INDEX.md exists, 2805 bytes.

notes: P4 SKIPPED (tech pack not needed), P9 SKIPPED (OSINT not needed), P10 SKIPPED (Browse Plan — no browser), P11 SKIPPED (Active Browse — no browser). Old skill skips phases instead of logging graceful degradation signals.

expectations.text: WordPress tech pack loaded
expectations.evidence: SESSION-BRIEF.md shows '[TECH-PACK-LATE-LOAD:wordpress:7.x:phase=6]' and '[LOADED:wordpress:6.x] (fallback)'. Tech pack loaded via late discovery.

expectations.text: Framework detected from feed or HTTP signals, not just HTML
expectations.evidence: Framework detected from Atom feed <generator> tag containing 'v=7.1-alpha-62259'. INDEX.md confirms 'Detection Source: Atom feed generator tag (late discovery)'.

expectations.text: tech-stack.md documents the discovery source
expectations.evidence: outputs/docs/research/wordpress-org-news/tech-stack.md is the generic WordPress tech pack template with no site-specific discovery source information. Discovery source documented in INDEX.md and SESSION-BRIEF.md instead.

notes: 7.x tech pack unavailable — 6.x loaded as fallback. Discovery source correctly in INDEX.md but missing from tech-stack.md.

expectations.text: WordPress tech pack loaded
expectations.evidence: session-brief.md: 'Status: NOT LOADED'. '[TECH-PACK-NOT-LOADED:wordpress:7.1-alpha]'. Phase 4 was never reached because Phase 3 returned [FRAMEWORK-UNKNOWN] for feed URL.

expectations.text: Framework detected from feed or HTTP signals, not just HTML
expectations.evidence: Phase 6 documents: '<generator>https://wordpress.org/?v=7.1-alpha-62259</generator> in RSS feed' as framework discovery source. tech-stack.md documents 'Source: generator tag in feed XML'. Detection happened; no action was taken on it.

expectations.text: tech-stack.md documents the discovery source
expectations.evidence: outputs/docs/research/wordpress-org-news-feed/tech-stack.md has detailed 'Framework Detection Notes (OLD SKILL BEHAVIOR)' section documenting the Phase 3 miss, Phase 6 generator tag discovery, and why no tech pack was loaded. Source documented more completely than with_skill.

notes: Irony: old_skill's tech-stack.md documents the discovery source more completely than with_skill's, despite failing to act on that discovery. No late-tech-pack-trigger mechanism in old skill v0.5.0.

Eval 2 (ecommerce-probe-list) passes for both configurations — does not differentiate skill versions. Old skill loads wrong WooCommerce version (9.x vs actual 10.x) but no assertion checks version accuracy.

Eval 4 (late-tech-pack-trigger) reveals an unexpected result: old_skill's tech-stack.md documents the discovery source more thoroughly than with_skill's. The assertion passes for old_skill and fails for with_skill on assertion 3.
with_skill delivers the core feature improvements (Write tool scaffold, all-phase completion markers, late tech pack trigger) with a 50-point pass rate advantage (+0.50 mean pass rate delta).
Timing data not available — placeholder zeros used. Token counts unavailable as runs were not instrumented.
runs_per_configuration is 1 — stddev values reflect eval-to-eval variance, not run-to-run variance. A proper benchmark would use 3+ runs per eval per configuration.
